final_prompt.prompt:
Create a comprehensive UI design system in a classic minimalist tech style, covering web Dashboard, mobile interfaces, cards, buttons, and controls.

Style/medium: needs a classic minimalist tech aesthetic with rich visual hierarchy and strong tech feel — exact stylistic execution is yours
Composition: must include web Dashboard, mobile interface, cards, buttons, and controls as system components
Subject: must include UI component library elements (Dashboard, mobile screens, cards, buttons, controls)
Scene/backdrop: 
Lighting/mood: needs a futuristic tech atmosphere — exact light source mix is yours
Color palette: needs a cool tech direction — exact hex values and ratios are yours
Materials/textures: needs a sleek digital surface treatment — exact grain / sheen / weight is yours
Text (verbatim): 
Constraints: must preserve the comprehensive design system scope (web Dashboard, mobile, cards, buttons, controls all visible)
Avoid:
